scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
